title: Change of Major, Minor, or Concentration
content:
Change of Major, Minor, or Concentration
Morgan State University - Office of the Registrar

This guide is for STUDENTS. It explains how to submit a request to change your major, minor, or concentration.

---

STEP 1: ENTER YOUR NAME
Enter your full name.

---

STEP 2: INCOMING STUDENT STATUS
Indicate whether you are an incoming student (first time at MSU).

---

STEP 3: ENTER CURRENT MAJOR AND GPA
Select your current major and enter your GPA. You can find your GPA on your unofficial transcript, in Degreeworks, or on your student profile.

---

STEP 4: SELECT WHAT YOU ARE CHANGING
Choose the type of change you want to make:

Changing Current Major: Select your new major, degree type (B.A., B.S., B.F.A.), and concentration.

Adding or Removing a Second Major: Select the degree type and concentration. To remove, select the major currently on your record. To replace, select a different major.

Adding or Removing a Minor: Check the appropriate option. If you already have a minor and are adding a second, the existing minor will be replaced.

Adding or Updating a Concentration: Select the applicable concentration.

IMPORTANT: DO NOT SELECT "MATH: Statistics" unless you are a Mathematics major. That concentration is only for Mathematics majors.

Reasons for Change (select one):
- Career alignment
- Curriculum too challenging
- Quality of academic support
- Quality of academic content

---

STEP 5: SUBMIT
Submit the form. Processing takes up to 10 business days. Chairperson approval is required.

For the full official guide with screenshots, view: [Change of Major Guide](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1z7vIvSsI3BPIQcOk_enNVymjR94Zq6Hq/view)
